top_signals.title: Micron earnings are set to send the market on a wild ride — and a new ETF may add to the volatility
top_signals.summary: The Roundhill T-REX 2X Long DRAM Daily Target ETF (RAM) is a 2x levered version of the popular DRAM ETF.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin falls under $60K, but traders anticipate 15% bounce
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin price dropped below $60,000 for the first time in weeks, but data shows traders betting on a relief bounce.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
